mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_distribution_record as a left join lkt_user as c on a.user_id = c.user_id left join lkt_user_distribution as d on d.user_id = c.user_id left join lkt_distribution_grade as g on g.id = a.user_level left join lkt_order as o on a.sNo = o.sNo and o.status != 0

trim.if: and (f.user_name like concat('%',#{search},'%') or c.p_name like concat('%',#{search},'%'))

mapper.select: select COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM lkt_order AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details AS c ON a.sNo = c.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS d ON c.sid = d.id LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS f ON a.user_id = f.user_id

select a.id,a.money,c.user_name as gm_name,c.headimgurl from lkt_distribution_record as a left join lkt_user as c on a.user_id = c.user_id left join lkt_order as o on a.sNo = o.sNo and o.status != 0
a.add_date ${add_date_sort},
